# Circuit Breaker

> Circuit Breaker is a browser-playable cyberpunk block-stacker with a five-stage Boss Rush mode.

## Canonical resource

- [Play Circuit Breaker](https://cb.correax.com/): Start the game, review the controls, and play Boss Rush in a modern browser.

## Published facts

- The game uses seven tetrominoes, SRS rotation, a seven-bag randomizer, hold, ghost preview, a local high score, and boss-driven voltage tiers.
- Boss Rush contains five rogue-AI encounters with distinct attack patterns; defeating a boss advances the voltage tier.
- A four-line clear triggers a `MAIN BREAKER TRIPPED` banner and a giant cyberpunk breaker Pacman.
- Music and sound effects are synthesized in the browser with the Web Audio API. Master, SFX, and BGM levels persist locally, as does mute state.
- The visual arcade ticker mixes game phrases with delayed market quotes from the first-party `/api/quotes` endpoint; ticker data is not analytics.
- Scores, volume preferences, and mute state remain in the visitor's browser and are not sent to the CorreaX tracker.
- Source code is available from the [Circuit Breaker repository](https://github.com/fabioc-aloha/circuit-breaker).
